name: io.github.llmem/llmem
description: MCP server extension for generating interactive graph visualizations and documentation for codebases

tools.name: file_info
tools.description: Extract structural information from a source file and return a prompt for LLM enrichment

tools.name: report_file_info
tools.description: Save LLM-generated file documentation to the .arch/ shadow filesystem

tools.name: folder_info
tools.description: Extract structural information from a folder and return a prompt for LLM enrichment

tools.name: report_folder_info
tools.description: Save LLM-generated folder documentation to the .arch/ shadow filesystem

tools.name: inspect_source
tools.description: Read specific line ranges from source files

tools.name: open_window
tools.description: Open the LLMem dependency graph visualization panel
